events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: the lap splice was estimated at ~24 bar diameters versus the ~40 bar diameters required by ACI 318 (Class B tension splice) per the placing drawings — a ~40% shortfall that's a structural non-conformance, not a minor tolerance deviation. Marked as `fail`, `high` risk, with corrective actions (EOR disposition, supplemental lap or mechanical splice, re-inspection before concrete placement).
